mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.category_id, s.name, s.code, s.icon, s.description, s.prompt_template, s.temperature, s.max_tokens, s.input_schema, s.output_format, s.module_key, s.status, s.sort_order, s.use_count, s.version, s.created_by, s.created_at, s.updated_at, c.name AS category_name FROM ai_skill s LEFT JOIN ai_skill_category c ON s.category_id = c.id
AND s.category_id = #{categoryId} AND s.module_key = #{moduleKey} AND s.status = #{status}
AND (s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name FROM ai_skill s LEFT JOIN ai_skill_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name FROM ai_skill s LEFT JOIN ai_skill_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_skill WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_skill WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill (category_id, name, code, icon, description, prompt_template, temperature, max_tokens, input_schema, output_format, module_key, status, sort_order, use_count, version, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{icon}, #{description}, #{promptTemplate}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{inputSchema}, #{outputFormat}, #{moduleKey}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, 0, #{version}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_skill SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
